hc15ed51fgf053g44f9gb9ecgab9c0422cb37: Damn Kagha to every hell, feeding a precious child to that serpent.
ha819645dg6aa0g404cgae67g5826cf30b55b: She might still be alive if we'd just spoken up...
ha179e463g164bg4becga20fgf3d717e2a273: Poor souls. We'll have to break the news to them.
he78120efga125g435agb330ge26609d88917: An unbearable tragedy. Kagha must pay for her cruelty.
h8032f2efg94efg411fg99f0g555aba2302bd: The swing of a sharp blade should do nicely.
h4534632bga9b3g426bg94c8g9ac81a6d627e: No child deserves such a violent fate.
hcd5f9c80gc7bcg41f7gb2e3gea5aaccd4cfc: Fate didn't kill this child. Kagha did.
h1e9f9379ga8c1g4751g8085g9a472c0db6c5: She knows nothing of mercy. And I have no intention of showing her mine.
he77e6e6eg4a19g4f46g9bf1g0ef632150589: We were right to stay silent. This matter is not our business.
h6c4bc9bfgb199g4071g8c16g06eb0943641a: You'd turn a blind eye to this outrage? You're cruel as Kagha.
hd6f25c52g3975g4294gac3bga07017c7719c: You can't compromise with evil - it always profits in the end.
h9262530bga2feg4c3ag8c42gd6ceb88ee02a: The druid had her reasons. Don't be so quick to judge.
h46b26d21ge932g4e8fg82aeg3588c38ba378: It was an accident. Kagha didn't order the snake to strike.
h080621dageb9ag4ab5gb68eg9a91c77fb9ec: An accident? She may not have sprung the trap, but she still set it.
h004ffdb7g7f6dg4ccbg8da1gc1bea86fb3b5: There's blood on Kagha's hands - enough to dye the Chionthar red.
h1953e2f8g6efeg4f12ga4fcg1771e417be16: I'm with Kagha. The child was a thief - she got what was coming to her.
h86c7368bg0892g4024gad85g17e05b7def1b: I'm supposed to believe you've acquired every trinket you're carrying through legal means?
h43d33234g799bg4125gad74g54228733ea08: What we saw was an atrocity. It shouldn't go unpunished.
h4d790127gc800g45fegbb2bg3847a04e2353: It's the girl's own fault. If she hadn't resisted, she'd still be alive.
hf791cc07g645ag4c81gb334g9c62ea6f73e9: Ah yes, that old refrain. 'If only she'd obeyed.'
ha10b9d39g4670g4252g9a8bgb737e51956d6: Words of evil masked as justice. Sickening.
h0f085b3ag223eg4324g82bfgb1a31e1f2e39: I don't care what she did. No one has the right to steal a child's future.
he6bbed07g700eg4ff4gb9fbg91aa27176c50: She might still be alive if we'd struck Kagha first...
